login.title: Start with your email
login.intro: We'll send a sign-in link to your inbox — one click and you're in. No password to remember.
login.consent: By continuing, you agree we'll never sell your resume to anyone.
login.sentBody: Check {email} and click the link to enter CVGenius. It's valid for 1 hour.

dashboard.intro: Start by creating a resume—write down your basic info and experience, and AI will turn it into a polished CV.

empty.title: Nothing here yet.
empty.desc: The fastest way to start is from a sample—we've pre-filled a complete new-grad resume you can edit directly. Already have one? Upload it and AI will structure it for you. Or start from a blank.

step1.title: Add experience
step1.desc: Write in plain words, then ✨ expand into professional highlights in one click

step2.title: Run a checkup
step2.desc: AI scores you across 5 dimensions—just follow it and improve

step3.title: Export
step3.desc: Pick a template, preview live, export a bilingual PDF

usage.title: This month's AI usage
usage.usedUp: Used up this month, resets on the 1st

search.placeholder: Search by name, headline, or target role

account.title: Account Settings
account.intro: Here's your basic info. Email is managed by Supabase, so changing it means going through the Magic Link flow again.

subscription.proDesc: Unlimited AI rewrites / checkups / PDF parsing unlocked.
subscription.freeDesc: 30 rewrites / 5 checkups / 3 parses per month. Upgrade to go unlimited.

session.title: Sign in & out
session.desc: After signing out, you'll need to sign in again with an email Magic Link.

email.label: Email (for sign-in)
email.hint: The change takes effect only after you click the confirmation link in the new inbox.

data.title: Export & delete
data.desc: Download all your data as a JSON file anytime, or permanently delete your account.
data.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete all your resumes, version history, AI records, and orders, and cancel any active subscription. This cannot be undone.

mfa.codeWrong: That code isn't right. Try again.
mfa.title: Add a second lock with an authenticator app
mfa.desc: Once on, signing in requires a 6-digit code from your authenticator in addition to the email link.
mfa.enrollDesc: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, etc.), or enter the key manually, then type the 6-digit code it generates.

sessionActions.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
sessionActions.othersDone: Signed out of all other devices; this device stays signed in.
sessionActions.desc: Signed in on a public computer, or worried someone else is in your account? Sign out everywhere else in one click.

upload.heading: Hand AI the resume you already have, structured in seconds
upload.intro: Upload a PDF, Word file, or just snap a photo of your resume. AI pulls out your education, projects, internships, skills, and awards, then drops them into the editor. From there you can rewrite, run a checkup, and export.

support.title: What's supported
support.line1: · PDF, Word (.docx), and images (png/jpg), up to 5 MB
support.line2: · Text-based PDF / Word is extracted directly; resume photos or screenshots go through AI recognition (OCR)
support.line3: · Scanned PDFs have no extractable text—upload a screenshot, or switch to "Paste text"
support.line4: · For legacy .doc files, save as .docx or export to PDF first
support.line5: · Chinese or English both work; the closer the content is to a resume format, the more accurate the extraction
support.line6: · We don't keep the original file—only the structured text

dropzone.title: Drag a PDF, Word file, or resume photo here, or click to choose
dropzone.hint: Up to 5 MB · PDF, Word (.docx), images (png/jpg)

running.note: This takes about 15-30 seconds—don't close the page

error.legacyDoc: Legacy .doc isn't supported yet—save as .docx or export to PDF
error.unsupported: Only PDF, Word (.docx), and images (png/jpg) are supported

paste.placeholder: Paste your resume text here—for scans, turn them into text with a phone scanner app first, or copy from the original document. AI will structure it into a resume automatically.
paste.remaining: {count} more {count, plural, one {character} other {characters}} to start
paste.busyNote: · Letting AI extract the structure, about 15-30 seconds

alreadyPro.title: You're already a Pro user
alreadyPro.desc: Unlimited AI rewrites, checkups, and PDF parsing are all unlocked.

billing.title: Upgrade to CVGenius {plan}
billing.intro: Clicking the button below takes you to Stripe checkout. Once you've paid, come back here and you'll see the confirmation.

feature.multiVersion: · One profile · tailored versions per role (cloning supported)

billing.canceledNotice: Your last checkout was canceled. You can start again anytime.
billing.accountFooter: Account {email} · Checkout is handled by Stripe; we never see your card number.

success.descDone: Your Pro features are unlocked—unlimited AI rewrites, checkups, and upload parsing. Now you can polish every resume you have to perfection.
success.descPending: Stripe just finished checkout, and we're receiving confirmation via webhook. Your account usually upgrades within a few seconds. If nothing changes after a minute, reach out to us.

mfa.title: Verify your identity
mfa.description: You've enabled two-factor authentication. Open your authenticator app and enter the current 6-digit code.

error.invalid: That code isn't right. Try again.

expired.title: Link no longer available
expired.desc: This share link has been turned off or has expired. If you still need access, please ask the sender for a new one.

gate.title: Access code required
gate.desc: The sender set an access code for this resume. Enter it to view.

hero.overline: For everyone just starting their career
hero.title:
A resume worth reading

starts with clearly explaining

what you've actually done.
hero.description:
We're not a resume template tool, nor a flashy AI ghostwriter.

We help you take the real things you did in course projects, your capstone, and campus life,

and put them in professional language—so people want to sit down and talk with you.
hero.ctaSecondary: I already have one—help me improve it

art.name: Alex Chen
art.projectBody: Independently designed and built the listing, search, and chat modules, supporting 800+ daily active users on campus.

footer.rights: © {year} For everyone writing their first resume.

product.title: CVGenius does just three things
product.subtitle: Not a template library, not a free-form generator, and we won't tell your story for you—we just help you explain your experience clearly.

write.label: Write
write.title: Structured editor
write.body: Organized by education, projects, and internships—just fill in the blanks. Cover basics, experience, skills, awards, and certificates in one place; every edit saves automatically.

rewrite.label: Edit
rewrite.title: Sentence-by-sentence AI rewrite
rewrite.body: Pick a vague bullet and AI turns it into a professional, verb-driven, number-backed line in 5 seconds. Every rewrite explains why—and which original facts it kept.

review.label: Review
review.title: AI full-resume review
review.body: Scores you across five dimensions—structure, role fit, professional tone, impact, and concision—flagging each issue and showing how to fix it, like a senior recruiter reading your resume end to end.

jobs.title: Roles we're especially good at
jobs.subtitle: AI rewrites and reviews tune their prompts to each role—no generic, one-size-fits-all advice. Every suggestion targets the job you're aiming for.

philosophy.title: We won't brag for you, and we won't make up your story
philosophy.subtitle: We just help you explain what you actually did, clearly.

honest.label: No fabrication
honest.body: AI never invents facts. When a number is missing, it prompts you to add one instead of making it up.

deStudent.label: Less student-speak
deStudent.body: Swap "participated in," "studied," and "familiar with" for "led," "built end to end," "streamlined," and "drove."

verbFirst.label: Lead with a verb
verbFirst.body: Start every bullet with an action—readers want to see what you did, not what you are.

results.label: Show results
results.body: Use numbers when you have them; when you don't, show concrete impact—people reached, frequency, the change you made.

pricing.title: Free for now—take your time
pricing.subtitle: Free for every new grad during launch. Paid plans will come later, but a free tier will always stay.

free.name: Free
free.description: Just starting your job search and writing your first resume? This tier is all you need.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Built for high-volume applications and juggling several roles at once.

confirm.delete: Delete this resume? This can't be undone.

editor.upgradeTitle: Free quota used up · upgrade to Pro for unlimited use

checkup.quotaExceeded: You've used all AI checkups this month ({used} / {limit}). Resets on the 1st.
checkup.label: Checkup
checkup.resultTitle: Your resume scored across five areas
checkup.runningHint: DeepSeek is reviewing your resume across 5 dimensions, usually 10–20 seconds.
checkup.issuesCount: {n, plural, one {# suggestion} other {# suggestions}}, sorted by severity

match.label: Match JD
match.runningTitle: Comparing the JD with your resume…
match.jdPlaceholder: Paste the full job description here — responsibilities, requirements, and nice-to-haves.
match.runningHint: AI is extracting JD keywords and checking your resume point by point, usually 10–20 seconds.

cover.label: Cover letter
cover.inputTitle: Write a cover letter that lands
cover.runningTitle: AI is turning your experience into a letter…
cover.jdLabel: Job description (optional — tailors the letter to the role)
cover.jdPlaceholder: Paste the target JD here; or skip it and AI will write a general letter for your target role.
cover.extraPlaceholder: e.g. "The company is Anthropic," "The hiring manager is Karen," "I want to highlight my interest in AI safety"
cover.runningHint: AI is weaving your most compelling experience into a 300–400 word letter. 10–20 seconds.

interview.label: Interview Qs
interview.inputTitle: Predict what you'll be asked, based on your resume
interview.runningTitle: Working out the interviewer's questions from your resume…
interview.resultTitle: Prepared {n, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}} for you
interview.jdLabel: Job description (optional — tailors the questions to the role)
interview.jdPlaceholder: Paste the target JD here; or skip it and AI will base questions on your target role.
interview.runningHint: AI is reading your resume and picking the questions worth prepping for, usually 10–20 seconds.

targetRole.heading: Target role
targetRole.hint: Tap a tag below to fill it in, or type something more specific (e.g. "Frontend Engineer · React"). Leave it blank for a general direction.
targetRole.placeholder: Or be more specific, e.g. "Frontend Engineer · React"

summary.heading: Summary
summary.placeholder: In two or three sentences, say who you are and what you're looking for.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.empty: No experience yet. Start with the buttons above — education, projects, and internships all count.

skills.heading: Skills
skills.empty: e.g. Languages, frameworks, tools. One category per line.

awards.heading: Awards & honors
awards.empty: Scholarships, competition rankings, honors — add the date, title, and issuer.

certs.heading: Certifications
certs.empty: CET-6, AWS, CKA, etc. — date, name, and issuer (optional).

languages.heading: Languages
languages.empty: e.g. English · CET-6 / IELTS 7.0; Japanese · N2. Language + level per line.

highlight.label: Highlights / Impact
highlight.empty: One sentence per line — start with a verb, and bring in numbers and concrete results where you can.
highlight.genPlaceholder: Describe what you did in plain words, and AI will expand it into 2–3 polished highlights (e.g. built a sign-up mini-app for a student club, used across 20+ events)
highlight.genEmpty: First, write one sentence about what you did
highlight.quotaExceeded: You've used your AI quota for this month
highlight.rowPlaceholder: What you led / what you built / what it achieved

rewrite.empty: Write a sentence first, then rewrite
rewrite.quotaExceeded: You've used your AI rewrites for this month
rewrite.title: Rewrite this line with AI
rewrite.label: ✨ Rewrite

footer.cloneTitle: Duplicate this resume to tailor it for a different role
footer.saveHint: Cmd / Ctrl + S to save now

guide.body: Not sure how to phrase your experience? Write a plain sentence in the highlights area and tap <gen>✨ Generate</gen> to let AI expand it into polished bullets. When you're done, hit Checkup at the top for a score and Interview Qs to prep ahead; then pick a template under Appearance, turn on Live preview to tweak as you go, and finally export to PDF.

template.title: Pick a template and preview the export live
template.orderHint: Section order (the header always stays first; empty sections won't appear in the export)
template.previewNote: Edit and preview side by side · the preview uses a light font, so a few rare characters may not show — the exported PDF is unaffected.

twocol.name: Two-column
twocol.desc: Info in the left column · experience on the right

share.title: Give recruiters a link, not an attachment
share.copyError: Couldn't copy — please select the link manually
share.viewedCount: Viewed {count, plural, one {# time} other {# times}}
share.liveHint: Anyone with the link can view your latest PDF; with a passcode, they'll need to enter it first. Edits sync over within about a minute.
share.offHint: Turn it on to generate a read-only link — no login needed for viewers. You can set an expiry and passcode, and turn it off anytime.
share.passcodeKeep: Leave blank to keep it, or type to update

versions.restoreConfirm: Restoring replaces the current content; the current version is auto-saved to history first. Continue?
versions.title: Save a version before you make changes
versions.count: {n, plural, one {# snapshot} other {# snapshots}} saved
versions.empty: No snapshots yet — open this anytime to save one
versions.hint: Once saved, all snapshots show up here. Tap Restore to roll content back to that point — the current content is auto-saved first, so you can always undo.

history.title: AI history
history.subtitle: Revisit the cover letters and interview prep you generated
history.empty: No cover letters or interview prep yet. They show up here once generated.

applications.title: Jobs you have applied to
applications.intro: Track which companies you applied to, which resume you used, and where each one stands.
applications.empty: Nothing tracked yet. Click "Add one" to start tracking your applications.
